name: ndollem-docs-tools
description: Marketplace for documentation tooling — generate, sync, and audit project docs with Claude Code.

plugins.name: docs
plugins.description: Documentation init/update/check/changelog skills — bootstrap, sync, audit, and changelog project docs from the codebase. init reads existing docs (README/CHANGELOG/etc.) before optionally scanning the code (--scan docs|full), then writes a CLAUDE.md that imports AGENTS.md so Claude Code loads it; existing files are never overwritten. changelog drafts Keep a Changelog notes from the branch diff against main, traces ticket numbers, and writes them to docs/changelog/YYYY/MM/DD/. All four commands appear in the / menu; init, update, and changelog confirm before writing files (use --yes to skip).
